title: The App Market
drDigitalIntro:
Your computer has a built-in app market where you download new apps safely.
• On some computers it's called App Store, on others Play Store or Microsoft Store — they all work the same way.
• Every app is reviewed before it's listed.
• Browse by category, search by name, or see what's trending.
• Each app shows a description, ratings, and reviews.

playgroundTask.goal: You found an app in the store

steps.say: You're in the App Market. Click on 'Games' in the category list.
Click on Puzzle Quest to see its details.
Click 'Go to Store' to go back to the main store page.

drDigitalSuccess: You browsed the App Market! Categories help you discover apps, and each app page shows ratings and reviews.
drDigitalHint: Click a category to browse, then click an app name to see its details.
